ext.description: Validate Minecraft Bedrock command syntax and provide command-aware completion for configurable target files.
command.validate.title: Validate Selected Bedrock Commands
config.title: MCBE Command Checker
config.showSyntaxHints: Show compact command syntax hints below each line.
config.showContextMenu: Toggle whether to show "Validate Selected Bedrock Commands" in context menus.
config.includeFilePatterns: Glob patterns for files to include in validation, hints, and completion (for example: **/*.mcfunction, **/*.txt).
config.edition: Command dataset edition used for validation and completion (normal or education).
